div1.entryFree: Offal, waste meat, the parts of a butchered animal not fit for use: a barrow of butcher's o. Wiv. III, 5, 5. Hence == refuse: what trash is Rome, what rubbish and what o. Caes. I, 3, 109. I should have fatted all the region kites with this slave's o. Hml. II, 2, 608 (i. e. with this slave, who is no more worth than offal).
